# AI Engineer, Global Operations
...
Iron Mountain is seeking a dynamic and experienced AI Engineer to join our Operations team. In this role, you will be responsible for designing and deploying production-ready Machine Learning models and Artificial Intelligence agents that optimize complex logistics workflows and drive measurable cost reductions.
...
- Develop End-to-End AI Solutions: Design, build, and monitor production-ready Machine Learning models and automated agents to streamline multi-step operational decision-making.
- Optimize Operational Workflows: Collaborate with Finance, Facilities, and Information Technology teams to build robust Extract, Transform, Load (ETL) pipelines and integrate predictive tools into existing warehouse and logistics software.
...
- Govern AI Safety and Compliance: Ensure the responsible deployment of all systems by performing rigorous model validation, maintaining strict data governance, and mitigating risk or bias in automated decisions.
...
- 5+ years of applied experience in Artificial Intelligence/Machine Learning engineering or advanced analytics, preferably within logistics, supply chain, or transportation industries.
...
- Advanced technical expertise in Python and SQL, with proven experience scaling "agentic" workflows and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) solutions using platforms like LangChain or n8n.
...
- Proven ability in strategic problem-solving and rapid prototyping, with the communication skills necessary to explain complex model outputs to non-technical business leaders.
...
- A Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative field such as Computer Science, Data Science, Engineering, or Mathematics.
